top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: Supplier code shares one Drive folder/parser with related supplier variants.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Use BB&B simple parser when source file has same columns; otherwise create AB2-specific profile.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: Supplier code shares one Drive folder/parser with related supplier variants.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Use BB&B simple parser.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: Supplier code shares one Drive folder/parser with related supplier variants.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Use Italasia parser but restrict by section/category when configuring AA2.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: Supplier code shares one Drive folder/parser with related supplier variants.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Use Italasia parser but restrict by premium wine section/brand list when configured.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: PDF extraction is not deterministic enough for direct database update.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: PDF table extractor can draft rows using code-prefixed lines and repeated header blocks. Treat asterisk special-condition marker and multi-line ratings as notes. Product admin review required before import.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: Supplier code is not mapped to a confirmed Drive folder.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Map supplier code to the correct Drive supplier folder, then profile latest file.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: PDF extraction is not deterministic enough for direct database update.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: PDF line parser can draft rows by matching category/product/size/pack/price pattern, but needs human review for line breaks and missing item codes.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: PDF extraction is not deterministic enough for direct database update.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Use Surawong PDF parser with BU variant rules.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: PDF extraction is not deterministic enough for direct database update.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Use Surawong PDF parser with Pernod Ricard brand/category filters.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: PDF extraction is not deterministic enough for direct database update.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Use Surawong PDF parser with Brown-Forman brand/category filters.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: Drive folder is mapped but no file parser profile has been learned yet.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Inspect latest month folder, fetch representative file text, identify headers, then add profile row.

top_problem_suppliers.supplier_name: ห้างหุ้นส่วน แฉล้มนิมิต
top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: Folder is known but file content has not been profiled.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Inspect latest supplier file and decide spreadsheet parser vs PDF draft extractor.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: File shape is learned but needs validation rules before full automation.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Spreadsheet repeated-header parser with price-expression parsing. Carry brand/producer/country section rows. Convert discounts like 1200-20% into raw price and discount fields; route NET/special/out-of-stock rows to review.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: PDF extraction is not deterministic enough for direct database update.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: PDF catalogue parser can draft rows from Size/Region/Product Type/price blocks. Human review required before SKU/cost/RSP update because item codes are not visible.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: Drive folder is mapped but no file parser profile has been learned yet.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Inspect latest month folder, fetch representative file text, identify headers, then add profile row.

top_problem_suppliers.blocker_or_risk: PDF extraction is not deterministic enough for direct database update.
top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: PDF block extractor across all files in latest folder. Use item code and product description, preserve region/grape/stock notes. Product admin review required due PDF ordering and multi-file source.

top_problem_suppliers.recommended_solution: Inspect latest month folder, fetch representative file text, identify headers, then add profile row.
